verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hallelujah, salvation and glory Honor and power unto the Lord, our God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the Lord, our God, is mighty Yes, the Lord, our God is omnipotent The Lord, our God, is wonderful

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All praises be to the King of Kings For the Lord, our God, is wonderful Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, He is wonderful
